expectations.evidence: Starts with '# CRZ Investigativna analyza: 2026-03-01 -- 2026-03-07'. Follows broad scan structure with Zhrnutie, CONFIRMED sections, INCONCLUSIVE, DISMISSED table, Odporucania.
Order: SVS Nitra (HIGH), HDH development (HIGH), Prahovanie (MEDIUM). Correct severity ordering.
'Preverene a vylucene (DISMISSED)' section with markdown table listing all 8 dismissed findings with reasons.
'Analyzovali sme 10 332 zmluv za tyzden... s celkovou hodnotou 658 911 763 EUR.'
12064598, 12063040, 12053309 all have full CRZ URLs in Dokazy tables. Also 12054420, 12058250, 12053796.
Sticks to input data. FinStat URLs added from ICOs (correct derivation). No invented financial figures or network data.
